form.formComment: Four-year-old filly by Girvin out of Karley O on debut. Purchased for USD $ 150,000 (Fasig-Tipton 2023 New York Bred Yearlings Sale). Worth considering if there is a move for her.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of four months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation third of 12 at this track December 13 over 1308m, 4 len behind Irish Fortune carrying 54kg at $5.98. First up last campaign second of 12 at Aqueduct Turf November 2 over 1207m, a nose behind Greyjoy with 54kg at $2.64. Can go on to better things this campaign.

form.formComment: Four-year-old filly by Mo Town out of Barrel Of Joy who has taken a long time to make it to the track. Purchased for USD $ 32,000 (Fasig-Tipton 2023 New York Bred Yearlings Sale). Prefer to see under race conditions.

form.formComment: At debut, crossed from a wide gate to settle just off the pace but gave ground when 5th of 11 at this track on February 28 over 1207m, 9 len behind Sugartown Sweetie with 55.5kg at $19.08. That race experience to prove invaluable.

form.formComment: First-starter by Honest Mischief out of Force Majeure. Prefer to see her at the races before recommending.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start 2nd in a small field at this track on March 12 over 1207m, 1.3 len behind Miss Jane Hathaway with 57kg at $4.23. The start before that 3rd of 7 at this track on February 5 over 1207m, 7 len behind Undergrad carrying 55.5kg at $17.65. Making headway. Likely to measure up again.
